name: Chegg, Inc.
description: Chegg, Inc. operates an interconnected, student-first learning platform designed to help students transition from high school to college and into their careers. The company offers a variety of services, including Chegg Study, which provides step-by-step textbook solutions and expert Q&A; Chegg Writing, which offers plagiarism detection and citation tools; and Chegg Math Solver. Additionally, Chegg provides textbook rentals and sales, as well as professional skills training, helping students improve their academic outcomes and career readiness.
